description: Simmons uses her intuition and kindness to calm the Inhuman undergoing Terrigenesis by dismissing the scientists and introducing herself. Her supportive approach appears to ease the subject's transformation, providing a rare, intimate moment inside the cocoon process and demonstrating Simmons's empathy and resourcefulness.

transcript.line: Listen to that. The heartbeat, and it's fast, 130 BPM. He's nervous. Lower the lights. Clear the room.

You will do that, because, despite the lack of respect I've been shown today, I assume I was brought here because your bosses value my expertise. So impress them by keeping me happy. Everyone out... now.

Hi. I'm Jemma Simmons. I'm from S.H.I.E.L.D. And I'm here to help you. I know this is all frightening, but I have friends who have also gone through this. But it's okay. I'm here, and we'll get through this together.
